kpis.name: Box entries
kpis.description: Number of ball carries into the penalty area adjusted by possession.

kpis.name: Goals
kpis.description: Number of non-penalty goals adjusted by possession.

kpis.name: Penalty area receptions
kpis.description: Number of successful pass receptions inside the penalty area divided by the team's possession percentage and multiplied by 0.5.

kpis.name: Touches in box
kpis.description: Number of open play touches in opponent penalty area when in possession (passes, shots, carries, dribbles, touches) adjusted by possession.

kpis.name: xG
kpis.description: Accumulated non-penalty expected goals adjusted by possession.
